data.body: Investigation (cluster F, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #16 Instruction Locality + #7 Multi-Step Reasoning Drift. ROOT_CAUSE: ticket-create.sh lines 251-289 detect missing 'Expected Behavior' / 'Actual Behavior' headers but emit a warning and exit 0 — the ticket is already created by then, the agent has moved on, and no in-context reminder exists at the composition site. Under end-session context pressure, agents substitute 'completeness of thought' for schema compliance (goal drift). PROPOSED_FIXES (in preference order): (a) PRIMARY: harden ticket-create.sh line 287 — change from warning (exit 0) to hard failure (exit 1) for missing required headers. Converts soft signal to hard gate. Preferred because it operates at mechanical layer (exit code) not advisory layer. (b) SECONDARY: CLAUDE.md rule "Before .claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug, read plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md and verify required headers." (c) Pre-creation stderr stub print from CLI. Option (a) is highest-leverage. Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
